scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/schema build && bun run --cwd packages/store build && bun run --cwd packages/server build && bun run --cwd packages/web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/schema typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/store typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/server typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/web typecheck
